description: This pipeline tracks spots in an image using TrackMate tracking. The main steps involve reading in the image, detecting spots using TrackMate detector, and then applying the TrackMate tracker to track these spots over time.

c40e5d98-8142-4c15-be31-ed779b2fc246.name: trackmate-detector
c40e5d98-8142-4c15-be31-ed779b2fc246.description:
Detect spots using TrackMate

This algorithm groups the incoming data based on the annotations. Those groups can consist of one data item per slot.

20f5d3ad-76fb-4b8b-8c5c-ebe8564c6ed1.name: trackmate-tracking
20f5d3ad-76fb-4b8b-8c5c-ebe8564c6ed1.description:
Track spots using TrackMate

This algorithm groups the incoming data based on the annotations. Those groups can consist of one data item per slot.
